page_title: List of omni-directional mobility gears (Attack on Titan 2 Game)
text:
Omni-directional Mobility Gear is the player's primary means of three dimensional movement in Attack on Titan 2. It is rated by Reel Speed (how fast the player is pulled into a Titan), Anchor Range (how far away a player can grapple a target), and Anchor Strength (how long a player may remain attached to a Titan).

Omni-directional Mobility Gear can be further fortified for additional Reel Speed and Anchor Strength.

Trivia

The ODM Gear with the highest Reel Speed is the Brilliance Zero with a base Reel Speed of 1000.
The ODM Gear with the highest Anchor Range is the Spirit Gear ODM lineage with a base Anchor Range of 150.
The ODM Gear with the highest Anchor Strength is the Heavy Gear Ver. 6 - Bright Burn with a base Anchor Strength of 1000.
